name: Exorcism of the Legion (Last Rites)
short_description: Exorcism of the Legion (Last Rites) is a complete collection of all FIVE chapters of the acclaimed VR experience. Investigate and exorcise sinister demonic entities as you make your way to a final confrontation with your darkest fears.
detailed_description:
Named one of the best VR horror experiences available by UploadVR, this is the Deluxe Complete Series with enhanced graphics & animations, upgraded movement controls and Index controller support. Just keep telling yourself "it's only VR".  Get it now before Steam Frame!

Please note the supported headsets for best results. If you own a Quest 2, Quest Pro, Quest 3, Pico 4, etc. please purchase from the respective stores as those control schemes are not officially supported.

Exorcism of the Legion (Last Rites) features support for tracked controllers, “teleport" and “free roam” locomotion options, and a variety of other highly customizable movement settings accessed via your in-game mobile phone.

  • Realistic, sinister and completely immersive environments hide rich story clues and a variety of unique secrets.

  • Find and use a several trademark exorcism tools as well as hidden “artifacts” to upgrade your instruments.

  • Receive cryptic messages from a mysterious stranger who seems to know your every move.

  • Return to the safety of your office at the end of every chapter to assess your performance and progress to the subsequent chapter.
